prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: He Knows I Bake at Midnight
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Lifetime Original
Tagline: Every town has a basement.
Theme: Some homes hold families. Some hold motive.
Omen: a lake bell ringing without wind
Relationship dynamic: emotionally charged casserole exchange
Props: scarf with impossible timing, snow globe, unopened letter

Cast:
- Rachel Sutton | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=architect | threat_aura=0.32 | space=side room with a space heater and old family records | secrets=has an unsent email that would destroy a family; buried one traumatic detail under work for years
- Claire Pruitt | archetype=soft_spoken_menace | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=sommelier with unusual patience | threat_aura=0.89 | space=meditation annex nobody uses in winter | secrets=knows exactly how long the sheriff takes to respond
- Daniel Hale | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=bartender who knows everybody's business | threat_aura=0.54 | space=meditation annex nobody uses in winter | secrets=once hid a casserole dish containing evidence

- Jenna Hale | archetype=decorative_husband | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=regional dentist | threat_aura=0.4 | space=side room with a space heater and old family records | secrets=moved money during a family emergency
- Tess Dane | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=innkeeper | threat_aura=0.52 | space=toolshed described as retreat supplies | secrets=saw the wrong person near the lake once and never shut up about it
- Tess Vale | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Cole Marlowe | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Claire Pruitt is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Rachel Sutton says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Winter Hollow.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Claire?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Tess. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Rachel. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The scarf with impossible timing is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Evelyn."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."

- expanded_synopsis: string, 180-320 words
